expectations.evidence: Uses HTML comments (<!-- Comment by @claude ... -->) instead of [!comment] callouts

expectations.text: Comments placed after paragraphs, not mid-paragraph
expectations.evidence: All HTML comments placed after paragraphs with blank lines
HTML comments have no collapse/expand functionality

expectations.text: Includes @author and date in each comment
Uses appropriate type tags where warranted
expectations.evidence: No type tags used — all comments are untyped

expectations.text: Includes re: field referencing the text being commented on
expectations.evidence: No re: field — comments reference context implicitly in prose
